summary: CP for underlying DOJ PIN question has been at 0.47 since Jan 29, sitting right at the 47% threshold for the meta-question
content:
CP History Key Points:
- Started at 0.70 in June 2025
- Rose to 0.75-0.76 in mid-June to mid-August 2025
- Declined to 0.71-0.72 in Aug-Sep 2025
- Further declined to 0.61 from late Sep to late Dec 2025
- Sharp drop in Jan 2026: 0.61 → 0.55 → 0.50 → 0.47
- Current CP: 0.47 (as of Feb 4, 2026)
- The CP has been at exactly 0.47 since Jan 29, 2026 (about 7 days)
- There was a brief bump to 0.55 on Jan 23 but it reverted
- Meta-question threshold is exactly 47%, which is exactly where CP sits now
- Meta-question resolves on Feb 15, 2026 - about 10 days from now
- 93 forecasters on meta-question, 117 on underlying question
